title: rhynchospora distans var. fascicularis
intro: Rhynchospora distans var. fascicularis, also known as a type of sedge, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhynchospora distans var. fascicularis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
